title: Measurement of Intracellular Ca2+ Concentration
author: Mengchen Shi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kcgcstw

steps.instruction: The intracellular Ca2+ concentration was estimated by co-incubating the cells with a cell-permeant Ca2 + fluorophore, Rhod-2 AM (2 μM).

Cells were seeded at a density of 102 cells onto a confocal culture dish. Washed with cold PBS and incubated in a 5% CO2 humidified incubator at 37℃ for 20 min after adding 20 µl of Rhod-2 AM working solution.
Next, the cells were washed twice with PBS and the changes of intracellular calcium were evaluated by a laser scanning confocal microscope (Zeiss LSM 710, Germany).
The Rhod-2 AM fluorescence was observed at 525 nm excitation (Ex)/590 nm emission (Em).
